name: PENTHOUSE PARTY - The whole Zenless Zone Zero cast
description:
You were one of the fortunate VIP invited to the exclusive Penthouse party, hosted by the famous singer Astra Yao herself. Get ready for a night with the most renowned and prominent figures in New Eridu.

You received an invitation from Astra Yao herself.

Tonight, the music will blast and alcohol will flow. And nowhere less than on one of Astra Yao's massive penthouses in the coast of New Eridu, near the huge Lumina City, basically built to host big and opulent parties with the rich and successful all over New Eridu.

Maybe you're here for the simple pleasures of the night? Seeking company of strangers or known friends? Maybe while everyone drinks and make fools out of themselves, you'll use of this opportunity to network or scheme?

Up to you.

Put on your good clothes, your expensive cologne and bring up your A game.

Tonight won't be a night you'll soon forget.

I took inspiration for this bot from the HOUSE PARTY series of @Crxscendoee (Great creator. Go check them out.)

I wanted to make my own version of it but for ZZZ characters.

Let me know if I should do a Wuthering Waves version as well if you enjoyed this one.

Characters you'll find in the party: [UPDATED!]

The Girls:

[Belle] [Yixuan] [Nicole] [Burnice] [Vivian] [Koleda] [Trigger] [Lucia] [Jane Doe] [Sunna] [Rina] [Nangong Yu] [Ellen Joe] [Pulchra] [Yuzuha] [Anby] [Zhu Yuan] [Seed] [Aria] [Promeia] [Cissia] [Yanagi] [Orphie & Magus] [Astra Yao] [Miyabi] [Grace] [Alice] [Soukaku] [Qingyi] [Ju Fufu] [Zhao] [Corin] [Caesar King] [Dialyn] [Nekomiya Mana] [Piper] [Lucy] [Yidhari] [Evelyn] [Soldier 11] [Ye Shunguang]

Da Boyz

[Wise] [Pan Yinhu] [Billy] [Harumasa] [Seth] [Lycaon] [Anton] [Lighter] [Ben] [Hugo] [Manato] [Banyue]

(Men don't sell in gacha, huh?)

All characters are over 21 years old or aged up to 21.

You know how it goes. Comments saying stuff like: "Oh.. .character X and Y are actually fetuses!" = Shadow Realm

Bot's profile pic by me. Made with PixAI

All characters featured in this bot are from "Zenless Zone Zero"

Bot tested with DeepSeek-V3-0324
